metadata.description: PyPI 上传: ```python # Command for uploading to PyPI twine upload dist/* # Test the upload on TestPyPI first twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/* # API token authentication is required for both commands above ``` Explanation: - `twine upload dist/*`: This command uploads the distribution files (usually created by tools like `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel`) to the Python Package Index (PyPI). - `twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/*`: This is used to test the upload process on TestPyPI, which is a testing environment for PyPI. - API token authentication: Both commands require an API token for authentication. You can obtain this by registering on PyPI and generating a personal access token from your account settings. Note that `twine` is a command-line utility used to upload Python packages to PyPI or other package indexes, and it handles the necessary authentication and metadata validation.

data_pointers.title: PyPI 上传
data_pointers.content_preview: PyPI 上传: ```python # Command for uploading to PyPI twine upload dist/* # Test the upload on TestPyPI first twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/* # API token authentication is required for both commands above ``` Explanation: - `twine upload dist/*`: This command uploads the distribution files (usually created by tools like `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel`) to the Python Package Index (PyPI). - `twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/*`: This is used to test the upload process on TestPyPI, which is a testing environment for PyPI. - API token authentication: Both commands require an API token for authentication. You can obtain this by registering on PyPI and generating a personal access token from your account settings. Note that `twine` is a command-line utility used to upload Python packages to PyPI or other package indexes, and it handles the necessary authentication and metadata validation.

content.full:
## 定义
PyPI上传是指将Python包构建为可分发的格式（如wheel或sdist）并发布到Python Package Index（PyPI）官方仓库或私有仓库的过程，使其他用户可以通过pip install命令安装该包。

## 何时使用
当您开发了一个可复用的Python库、工具或框架，并希望分享给社区或团队使用时，需要将其上传到PyPI。此外，当您需要管理包的版本迭代、依赖关系，并确保用户能通过标准方式安装时，也应使用PyPI上传。

## 示例
```Python
# 首先确保已安装必要的工具
# pip install setuptools wheel twine

# 项目结构示例：
# my_package/
# ├── my_package/
# │   └── __init__.py
# ├── setup.py
# └── README.md

# setup.py 内容：
from setuptools import setup, find_packages

setup(
    name='my-package',
    version='0.1.0',
    packages=find_packages(),
    install_requires=[],
    author='Your Name',
    description='A sample package',
)

# 构建并上传命令（在项目根目录执行）：
# python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel
# twine upload dist/*
```

## 反例
错误用法：直接使用`python setup.py upload`（已废弃且不安全），或上传前未清理旧的`dist/`目录导致重复上传相同版本。

## 边界条件
上传前需确保包名在PyPI上唯一，且版本号符合PEP 440规范（如`0.1.0`）。若使用TestPyPI测试，需指定仓库URL：`twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/*`。
content.code_pattern:
from setuptools import setup, find_packages

setup(
    name='your-package-name',
    version='0.1.0',
    packages=find_packages(),
    install_requires=[],
    author='Your Name',
    author_email='your@email.com',
    description='A short description',
    long_description=open('README.md').read(),
    long_description_content_type='text/markdown',
    url='https://github.com/your/repo',
    classifiers=[
        'Programming Language :: Python :: 3',
        'License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License',
    ],
    python_requires='>=3.6',
)
common_pitfalls: 未在PyPI上注册账户或未配置API令牌，导致twine upload时认证失败。需先创建账户并在~/.pypirc中配置令牌。
上传前未更新版本号，导致重复上传相同版本被拒绝。每次发布必须递增版本号。
忘记包含README或LICENSE文件，导致包描述为空或缺失许可证信息，影响用户使用。
使用已废弃的python setup.py upload命令，该方式会明文传输密码，应改用twine工具。
